evals.prompt: My Steel automation gets a 403 and a 'verify you are human' page. Plan the least invasive fix.
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies reliability signals, preserves evidence, checks feature access, starts with identity/pacing, then escalates to proxies or CAPTCHA only when justified.
assertions: Identifies 403 and verify-human copy as reliability signals
Checks Steel feature access before paid proxy or CAPTCHA options

evals.prompt: I'm on Hobby but have PROXY_SERVER. Show the safe Steel BYOP pattern and explain what not to enable.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses BYOP via environment variable, avoids Steel-managed useProxy true on Hobby, protects proxy credentials, and handles transient proxy errors.
assertions: Uses BYOP with a proxy server from an environment variable
Does not use Steel-managed useProxy true as the Hobby-plan solution
States BYOP is separate from Steel-managed proxy bandwidth
Keeps proxy credentials out of logs and prompts
Mentions retry or fallback for transient tunnel errors

evals.prompt: Steel session sess_123 failed but I don't know why. Figure out what happened.
evals.expected_output: The agent should route first to steel-session-debugging because the failure class is unknown and evidence has not been collected.
assertions: Does not start with proxy or CAPTCHA mitigation
Routes unknown failed-session diagnosis to steel-session-debugging
Requests or uses session diagnostics before proposing reliability changes
